title: spergularia maritima subsp. angustata
intro: Spergularia maritima subsp. angustata, also known as coastal sand-spurrey, is a subspecies of the annual or biennial plant Spergularia maritima, native to the coastal areas of Europe and Asia. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Spergularia maritima subsp. angustata include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Spergularia maritima subsp. angustata can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusing it in hot water to utilize its medicinal properties.
